## What was changed

Write a summary no longer than one paragraph describing what changed.

- `<repo-relative-path>`: Brief explanation of what was touched and why.

## How to review

Describe the recommended review path for this PR.

- Entrypoint files or modules to read first
- Suggested review order across files or commits
- Local setup or commands needed to validate behavior

## What the implication was

Describe the exact implications of the change. Use Mermaid diagrams where they materially improve review clarity.

## Checks and tests performed

List the checks and tests used to validate the change.

- Check or test name: What is being tested, the expected outcome, and how the test validates it.
- Property-based tests: Also include the asserted invariants, generator bounds, and how failures can be replayed from seed/path.
